---
title: "Ecommerce Performance Report"
subtitle: "Executive Summary · Aug 2016 – Aug 2017"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    scrolling: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(bigrquery)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(DT)
library(bslib)
library(bsicons)

project_id <- "ga4-analysis-491223"

sql <- "
SELECT
  PARSE_DATE('%Y%m%d', date) AS session_date,
  trafficSource.source AS source,
  trafficSource.medium AS medium,
  device.deviceCategory AS device_category,
  geoNetwork.country AS country,
  COUNT(DISTINCT fullVisitorId) AS users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(fullVisitorId, CAST(visitId AS STRING))) AS sessions,
  SUM(IFNULL(totals.pageviews, 0)) AS pageviews,
  SUM(IFNULL(totals.transactions, 0)) AS transactions,
  SUM(IFNULL(totals.transactionRevenue, 0)) / 1000000 AS revenue
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20160801' AND '20170801'
GROUP BY session_date, source, medium, device_category, country
"

ga_mart <- bq_project_query(project_id, sql) |>
  bq_table_download()

# ── Aggregations ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

daily <- ga_mart |>
  group_by(session_date) |>
  summarise(
    users        = sum(users, na.rm = TRUE),
    sessions     = sum(sessions, na.rm = TRUE),
    transactions = sum(transactions, na.rm = TRUE),
    revenue      = sum(revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups      = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    conversion_rate     = transactions / sessions,
    revenue_per_session = revenue / sessions
  )

source_perf <- ga_mart |>
  group_by(source, medium) |>
  summarise(
    sessions     = sum(sessions, na.rm = TRUE),
    transactions = sum(transactions, na.rm = TRUE),
    revenue      = sum(revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups      = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(conversion_rate = transactions / sessions) |>
  arrange(desc(revenue)) |>
  slice_head(n = 8)

device_perf <- ga_mart |>
  group_by(device_category) |>
  summarise(
    sessions     = sum(sessions, na.rm = TRUE),
    transactions = sum(transactions, na.rm = TRUE),
    revenue      = sum(revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups      = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    conversion_rate = transactions / sessions,
    revenue_share   = revenue / sum(revenue)
  )

country_perf <- ga_mart |>
  group_by(country) |>
  summarise(
    sessions     = sum(sessions, na.rm = TRUE),
    transactions = sum(transactions, na.rm = TRUE),
    revenue      = sum(revenue, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups      = "drop"
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(revenue)) |>
  slice_head(n = 8)

# ── KPIs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
total_revenue      <- sum(daily$revenue)
total_transactions <- sum(daily$transactions)
total_sessions     <- sum(daily$sessions)
overall_cvr        <- total_transactions / total_sessions
rev_per_session    <- total_revenue / total_sessions

# ── Shared theme ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
theme_exec <- function() {
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title         = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold",
                                        color = "#111827", margin = margin(b = 3)),
      plot.subtitle      = element_text(size = 10, color = "#6B7280",
                                        margin = margin(b = 10)),
      axis.text          = element_text(size = 9, color = "#9CA3AF"),
      axis.title         = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "#F3F4F6", linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
      plot.background    = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.background   = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.margin        = margin(12, 16, 8, 16)
    )
}

C_BLUE   <- "#2563EB"
C_GREEN  <- "#059669"
C_PURPLE <- "#7C3AED"
C_AMBER  <- "#D97706"
```

# Overview

## Row {height="18%"}

```{r}
value_box(
  title    = "Total Revenue",
  value    = dollar(total_revenue, big.mark = ","),
  showcase = bs_icon("currency-dollar"),
  theme    = value_box_theme(bg = "#EFF6FF", fg = "#1D4ED8")
)
```

```{r}
value_box(
  title    = "Transactions",
  value    = comma(total_transactions),
  showcase = bs_icon("bag-check-fill"),
  theme    = value_box_theme(bg = "#F0FDF4", fg = "#065F46")
)
```

```{r}
value_box(
  title    = "Conversion Rate",
  value    = percent(overall_cvr, accuracy = 0.1),
  showcase = bs_icon("graph-up-arrow"),
  theme    = value_box_theme(bg = "#FAF5FF", fg = "#6D28D9")
)
```

```{r}
value_box(
  title    = "Revenue / Session",
  value    = dollar(rev_per_session, accuracy = 0.01),
  showcase = bs_icon("lightning-charge-fill"),
  theme    = value_box_theme(bg = "#FFFBEB", fg = "#92400E")
)
```

```{r}
value_box(
  title    = "Total Sessions",
  value    = comma(total_sessions),
  showcase = bs_icon("cursor-fill"),
  theme    = value_box_theme(bg = "#F0F9FF", fg = "#0369A1")
)
```

## Row {height="42%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Revenue trend"
ggplot(daily, aes(x = session_date, y = revenue)) +
  geom_area(fill = C_BLUE, alpha = 0.10) +
  geom_line(color = C_BLUE, linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar,
                     expand  = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months") +
  labs(title    = "Daily revenue",
       subtitle = "Ecommerce revenue over the full period") +
  theme_exec()
```

```{r}
#| title: "Conversion rate trend"
ggplot(daily, aes(x = session_date, y = conversion_rate)) +
  geom_area(fill = C_GREEN, alpha = 0.10) +
  geom_line(color = C_GREEN, linewidth = 1.1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 0.1),
                     expand  = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", date_breaks = "2 months") +
  labs(title    = "Conversion rate",
       subtitle = "Transactions divided by sessions per day") +
  theme_exec()
```

## Row {height="40%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Top channels by revenue"
ggplot(source_perf, aes(x = reorder(source, revenue), y = revenue)) +
  geom_col(fill = C_BLUE, width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = dollar(round(revenue))),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3, color = "#6B7280") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar,
                     expand  = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.22))) +
  labs(title    = "Revenue by channel",
       subtitle = "Top 8 acquisition sources") +
  theme_exec()
```

```{r}
#| title: "Conversion rate by channel"
ggplot(source_perf,
       aes(x = reorder(source, conversion_rate), y = conversion_rate)) +
  geom_col(fill = C_PURPLE, width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = percent(conversion_rate, accuracy = 0.1)),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3, color = "#6B7280") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 0.1),
                     expand  = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.22))) +
  labs(title    = "Conversion rate by channel",
       subtitle = "Which sources drive the most efficient traffic") +
  theme_exec()
```

# Audience Breakdown

## Row {height="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Revenue share by device"
ggplot(device_perf,
       aes(x = reorder(device_category, revenue_share),
           y = revenue_share, fill = device_category)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = percent(revenue_share, accuracy = 0.1)),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 4, color = "#6B7280") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "desktop" = C_BLUE,
    "mobile"  = C_GREEN,
    "tablet"  = C_PURPLE
  )) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1),
                     expand  = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))) +
  labs(title    = "Revenue share by device",
       subtitle = "% of total revenue from each device type") +
  theme_exec()
```

```{r}
#| title: "Conversion rate by device"
ggplot(device_perf,
       aes(x = reorder(device_category, conversion_rate),
           y = conversion_rate, fill = device_category)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = percent(conversion_rate, accuracy = 0.1)),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 4, color = "#6B7280") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "desktop" = C_BLUE,
    "mobile"  = C_GREEN,
    "tablet"  = C_PURPLE
  )) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 0.1),
                     expand  = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))) +
  labs(title    = "Conversion rate by device",
       subtitle = "Which device types convert best") +
  theme_exec()
```

## Row {height="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Top 8 markets by revenue"
ggplot(country_perf, aes(x = reorder(country, revenue), y = revenue)) +
  geom_col(fill = C_AMBER, width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(aes(label = dollar(round(revenue))),
            hjust = -0.1, size = 3, color = "#6B7280") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar,
                     expand  = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.22))) +
  labs(title    = "Top 8 markets by revenue",
       subtitle = "Highest-value geographic regions") +
  theme_exec()
```

```{r}
#| title: "Channel performance summary"
source_perf |>
  select(source, medium, sessions, transactions, revenue, conversion_rate) |>
  mutate(
    revenue         = dollar(round(revenue)),
    conversion_rate = percent(conversion_rate, accuracy = 0.1),
    sessions        = comma(sessions)
  ) |>
  datatable(
    colnames = c("Source", "Medium", "Sessions",
                 "Transactions", "Revenue", "Conv. Rate"),
    rownames = FALSE,
    options  = list(
      pageLength   = 8,
      dom          = "t",
      scrollX      = FALSE,
      initComplete = JS("
        function(settings, json) {
          $(this.api().table().header()).css({
            'background-color': '#F9FAFB',
            'color': '#374151',
            'font-size': '11px',
            'font-weight': '600'
          });
          $(this.api().table().node()).css('font-size', '12px');
        }
      ")
    ),
    class = "stripe hover compact"
  )
```
